title: NeoBallerite
description: Jam, cheese, FULLY CUSTOMIZABLE SANDWICHES? More berries! CORN!
body:
_Successor of "Ballerite Mod"_

### A mod that aims to enhance the vanilla experience, without major changes.
### Jam, cheese, FULLY CUSTOMIZABLE SANDWICHES? More berries! CORN!

_(A 1.21.4 version is in the works.)_

_**New wood types, materials, lantern variants.**_
![Withered wood preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97398c635ba4edca0055b184c996d65df248cff4_0.webp)
![Star wood preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d399d41c2ea6ea778d5923fa3aaa08a7356f308a_0.webp)





# A list of addons and changes :
## Combat and building
- Withered wood : a new yellow-ish wood that generates in forests.
- Star wood : a pale pink wood that generates in savannah biomes.
  - _The idea and texture for this wood was made when minecraft was at 1.18, so pale wood is actually a ripoff of me_ :) (\s)
- Star leaves can be used to make a "Farmer's Boots" item, **which negates berry bush damage!**
- **Ballerite**, a material which when processed multiple times makes ingots that are stronger than iron.
  - Armor set effects : +3 luck
- **Lead**, a material that is similiar to gold but has more durability, and inflicts poison damage due to lead poisoning.
  - Armor set effects : Solid knockback durability, but slows you down.
- **Claymores**, which are stronger than normal swords but slightly slower and more expensive.
## Food
- Knives, which when used with bread and meat, makes sandwiches.
- Jam, which is made by using various fruits and a knife.
- Villagers love jam. Take advantage of their love for processed-sugars to line your wallet.
- Cheese, which can be used in combination with most foods, and even sandwiches.
- Cheese is made by combining milk with any fungal item.
- There are cheese variants depending on the mushroom type
- Sandwiches, which can be made with any meat item and combined with cheese. Can be made with normal bread and corn bread!
- Sandwiches are fully modular, you can add cheese or meat to a sandwich at any point by combining a knife and a sandwich with any valid ingredient
- New egg foods, so you can finally eat chicken children.
- New crops, including : Tomatoes, Eggplants, Corn, Sweet potatoes.
- New berries, including : Blueberries, Blackberries, Strawberries.
- Iron and diamond carrots.
## Enchantments and Decoration / etc.
- Lead lanterns, which are slightly less bright than normal, and have a different animation
- Unlit lanterns, which are just... Unlit lanterns. Can be lit back with any torch or fire starter.
- Two new enchantments, Poisoned tip, and Thor's curse.
- Poisoned tip inflicts poison damage based on level
- Thor's curse strikes your enemies with thunder if you're exposed to the sky.
- Zombies now have a chance to WIELD KNIVES.
- Some vanilla items are now edible including :
- Sugar, Glistering melons, Fermented spider eyes, Magma cream.

### And more. Download to finally satisfy your dreams of gluttony in minecraft.

_Note : NeoBallerite is in early-access, and will only be open-sourced after release._
